# Agent Skills

This directory contains project-level Copilot skills.

## Included skills

- `challenge-hub-backend-delivery`
  - Playbook for backend implementation in Spring Boot stack.
- `challenge-hub-frontend-delivery`
  - Playbook for frontend implementation in React/TypeScript stack.
- `challenge-hub-spec-guard`
  - Contract and requirements consistency checks.
- `challenge-hub-quality-gate`
  - Validation checklist for pre-merge confidence.

## Conventions

- Each skill lives in its own lowercase, hyphenated directory.
- Each skill must contain `SKILL.md`.
- Add optional scripts/resources in the same skill directory and reference them from `SKILL.md`.
